query:
SELECT w.id, w.code, w.full_name, w.daily_rate, w.group_id, 
       pbi.days_worked, pbi.total_deductions, pbi.total_bonuses, pbi.net_amount
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN payroll_batch_items pbi ON w.id = pbi.worker_id AND pbi.batch_id IN (SELECT id FROM payroll_batches WHERE period_start = '2026-02-02')
WHERE w.group_id = 1
ORDER BY w.code;
